title: pisum commune subsp. elatius
intro: Pisum commune subsp. elatius, commonly known as garden pea, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pisum commune subsp. elatius include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a useful remedy for conditions such as arthritis and irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties.
